matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
seeded_markers: CHEK2 c.1100delC model (CHEK2 truncating founder model)
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a CHEK2 checkpoint kinase review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to DNA damage checkpoint signaling, p53 and BRCA pathway crosstalk, cell-cycle arrest, and hereditary cancer modifier biology and Hereditary cancer susceptibility context, DNA damage checkpoint biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_prediction_rules.prediction: GT-confirmed CHEK2 c.1100delC model dosage suggests this sample carries the CHEK2 prediction context described by the gene-level thesis. The variant observed in this sample suggests a CHEK2 checkpoint kinase review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to DNA damage checkpoint signaling, p53 and BRCA pathway crosstalk, cell-cycle arrest, and hereditary cancer modifier biology and Hereditary cancer susceptibility context, DNA damage checkpoint biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. This specific marker is curated as CHEK2 truncating founder model. CHEK2 c.1100delC model is curated as a CHEK2 marker for Hereditary cancer susceptibility context, DNA damage checkpoint biology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the DNA damage checkpoint signaling, p53 and BRCA pathway crosstalk, cell-cycle arrest, and hereditary cancer modifier biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched CHEK2 c.1100delC model at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the CHEK2 prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.
variant_prediction_rules.basis: Can modify or tag DNA damage checkpoint signaling, p53 and BRCA pathway crosstalk, cell-cycle arrest, and hereditary cancer modifier biology.

cases.label: Gene variant found

cases.label: Gene variant found + high whitelist mean beta
